title: Tenure employee experience — self-critique and improvement plan
summary: Self-critique of the twelve-frame lifecycle board dispatch, written against the live Figma canvas. Top issue: the Lifecycle summary frame fails AAA contrast on every per-stage cost value and carries a gross-margin figure that is arithmetically imprecise (99.7% shown, 99.74% correct) and semantically ambiguous (inference-cost margin labelled as gross margin). The single change that would most raise the bar is a twenty-minute fix to that one frame — correct the arithmetic, correct the label, move the cost value text to a passing contrast token. Five P0 items documented; eleven additional P1/P2/P3 improvements planned; improvement plan written to /tenure/employee-experience-improvement-plan.md.
